Gregory A. Brubaker, Esq. (415) 845 7109 for Defendant and Moving Party Lowrey
Peter M. Bransten, Esq., Pillsbury Winthrop (415) 983-1000 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Financial Title Company, Inc.
RULING:
There is a settlement; however, the stipulated judgment has not been resolved.
DEFENDANT KAY LOWREY'S Amended Motion To Set Aside Default is DENIED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Russell Robinson, Esq. (415) 255-0402 for Defendant and Moving Party Lowrey
Peter M. Bransten, Esq., Pillsbury Winthrop (415) 983-1395 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Financial Title Company, Inc.

RULING:
A R G U E D; The Court having found attorney error, CONTINUES DEFENDANT KAY LOWREY'S (First Amended) Motion To Set Aside Default to 01/18/05 in Dept. 301. Counsel shall file supplemental briefs as follows: Defendant's supplemental brief shall be filed and served no later than 01/03/05; Plaintiff's opposition shall be filed and served no later than 01/10/05; Defendant's reply shall be filed and served no later than 01/13/05. (301/JLW/CA-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Order To Show Cause For Defendants Kay Lowrey And Bank Of America N.A.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Peter M. Bransten, Esq., Pillsbury Winthrop (415) 983-1000 for Plaintiff and Moving Party Financial Title Company, Inc.
Russell A. Robinson, Esq. (415) 255-0462 for Defendant and Opposing Party Lowery
RULING:
The Court discloses a possible conflict. A R G U E D. PLAINTIFF FINANCIAL TITLE COMPANY, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORP'S Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction For Defendants Kay Lowrey And Bank Of America N.A.: GRANTED; the Preliminary Injunction shall remain in effect until such time as it is modified upon application to the Court or upon trial in this matter. Plaintiff Financial Title Company shall post a bond in the amount of $10,000.00. Order signed. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
